heading: Permission to make complaint
label: 10907 Permission to make complaint
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1090746:65346:664Section 10907 prohibits a master from hindering a seaman from making a complaint authorized by this chapter and subjects the master to a fine for violation of this section.

children.label: a
children.text: A master may not refuse to permit, deny the opportunity to, or hinder a seaman who wishes to make a complaint authorized by this chapter.

children.label: b
children.text: A master violating this section is liable to the United States Government for civil penalty of $500.
